ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; FIRST SET OF FORM INTERROGATORIES; FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES (FOR PURPOSE OF TENTATIVE RULING ONLY) HEARING SET FOR SEP-18-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302
DISCOVERY, 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS IS OFF CALENDAR AT THE REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY. (302)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,000.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT IVETH OLMOS. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $3,848.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DISCOVERY 302, MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 24, 2015. JUDGE PRO TEM CHARLES GEERHART, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED. (D302)
